message:
test(engine): add ESM/CJS module import integration tests and update bead tracker

Add eight filesystem-backed integration tests that verify the full
ImportModule/ExportBinding pipeline from IR3 instruction through file
resolution, parsing, lowering, and execution:
  - ESM import via explicit .js, extensionless (.mjs preference), and
    directory specifier (index.mjs preference)
  - CJS import: default export via module.exports, named export projection
  - CJS-from-ESM require() interop and CJS-to-CJS require() chains

Extend InterpreterError exhaustiveness vectors with RequireSpecifierNotString.
Add module_root: None to custom-config router test. Update ImportDeclaration
literals in ast_integration and ast_enrichment_integration to supply the
now-required clause field.

Beads: mark RC-2.3 event-loop bead in_progress; refresh RGC-402 CJS/ESM
interop timestamp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
